sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contacts" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "source_type" INTEGER NOT NULL, "kind" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "source_id" TEXT NULL, "first_name" TEXT NULL, "last_name" TEXT NULL, "alias_name" TEXT NULL, "thumbnail" BLOB NULL, "registered" INTEGER NULL CHECK (registered IN (0, 1)), "user_registered" INTEGER NULL CHECK (user_registered IN (0, 1)), "is_current_user" INTEGER NULL CHECK (is_current_user IN (0, 1)), "inserted_at" INTEGER NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, UNIQUE(source_type, source_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contact_phones" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, "contact_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "inserted_at" INTEGER NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, UNIQUE(number, label, contact_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contact_emails" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "address" TEXT NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, "contact_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "inserted_at" INTEGER NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, UNIQUE(address, contact_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "call_logs" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "direction" INTEGER NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "call_logs.number not_empty" CHECK (length(number) > 0), "username" TEXT NULL, "video" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (video IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "accepted_at" INTEGER NULL, "hung_up_at" INTEGER NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "favorites" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "contact_phone_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES contact_phones(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "position" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "favorites_outbox" ("number" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "action" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_id" TEXT NULL, "label" TEXT NULL, "position" INTEGER NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(number, source_type, "action"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "favorites_v2" ("number" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, "position" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(number, source_type));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chats" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NULL, "created_at_remote" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at_remote" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_members" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "group_authorities" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_messages" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "sender_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "reply_to_id" INTEGER NULL, "forward_from_id" INTEGER NULL, "author_id" TEXT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "edited_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NULL, "deleted_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_message_sync_cursors" ("chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "cursor_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(chat_id, cursor_type));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_message_read_cursors" ("chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(chat_id, user_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_outbox_messages" ("id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "chat_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "participant_id" TEXT NULL, "reply_to_id" INTEGER NULL, "forward_from_id" INTEGER NULL, "author_id" TEXT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(id_key));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_outbox_message_edits" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "new_content" TEXT NOT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_outbox_message_deletes" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_outbox_read_cursors" ("chat_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chats(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(chat_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_conversations" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "first_phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "second_phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at_remote" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at_remote" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_messages" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "external_id" TEXT NULL, "conversation_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES sms_conversations(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "from_phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "to_phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "sending_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_message_sync_cursors" ("conversation_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES sms_conversations(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "cursor_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(conversation_id, cursor_type));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_message_read_cursors" ("conversation_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES sms_conversations(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(conversation_id, user_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_outbox_messages" ("id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES sms_conversations(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "from_phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "to_phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "recepient_id" TEXT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(id_key));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_outbox_message_deletes" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES sms_conversations(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sms_outbox_read_cursors" ("conversation_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES sms_conversations(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(conversation_id));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sip_subscriptions" ("type" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "contact_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "subscribed_at_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(type, number));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sip_subscriptions_outbox" ("action" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "contact_user_id" TEXT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY("action", type, number));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_sms_numbers" ("phone_number" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(phone_number));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "active_messaging_notifications" ("notification_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "message_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "conversation_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "body" TEXT NOT NULL, "time" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(notification_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "voicemails" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "date" TEXT NOT NULL, "duration" REAL NOT NULL, "sender" TEXT NOT NULL, "receiver" TEXT NOT NULL, "seen" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (seen IN (0, 1)), "size" INTEGER NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "attachment_path" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "system_notifications" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "seen" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (seen IN (0, 1)), "created_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at_remote_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "system_notifications_outbox" ("notification_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES system_notifications(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "action_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL, "send_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(notification_id, action_type));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "presence_info" ("id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "available" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (available IN (0, 1)), "note" TEXT NOT NULL, "status_icon" TEXT NULL, "device" TEXT NULL, "time_offset_min" INTEGER NULL, "timestamp_usec" INTEGER NULL, "activities_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "source" TEXT NOT NULL, "arrival_time_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(number, source, id_key));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dialog_info" ("id_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL, "call_id" TEXT NULL, "direction" TEXT NULL, "local_tag" TEXT NULL, "local_number" TEXT NULL, "local_display_name" TEXT NULL, "remote_tag" TEXT NULL, "remote_number" TEXT NULL, "remote_display_name" TEXT NULL, "arrival_version" TEXT NOT NULL, "arrival_time_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(entity_number, id_key));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cdrs" ("call_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "direction" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "callee" TEXT NOT NULL, "callee_number" TEXT NULL, "caller" TEXT NOT NULL, "caller_number" TEXT NULL, "connect_time_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "disconnect_time_usec" INTEGER NOT NULL, "disconnect_reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "duration_seconds" INTEGER NOT NULL, "recording_id" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(call_id));

CREATE TRIGGER contacts_after_insert_trigger AFTER INSERT ON contacts BEGIN UPDATE contacts SET inserted_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id AND inserted_at IS NULL;UPDATE contacts SET updated_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id;END
CREATE TRIGGER contacts_after_update_trigger AFTER UPDATE ON contacts BEGIN UPDATE contacts SET updated_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id;END

CREATE TRIGGER contact_phones_after_insert_trigger AFTER INSERT ON contact_phones BEGIN UPDATE contact_phones SET inserted_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id AND inserted_at IS NULL;UPDATE contact_phones SET updated_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id;END
CREATE TRIGGER contact_phones_after_update_trigger AFTER UPDATE ON contact_phones BEGIN UPDATE contact_phones SET updated_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id;END

CREATE TRIGGER contact_emails_after_insert_trigger AFTER INSERT ON contact_emails BEGIN UPDATE contact_emails SET inserted_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id AND inserted_at IS NULL;UPDATE contact_emails SET updated_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id;END
CREATE TRIGGER contact_emails_after_update_trigger AFTER UPDATE ON contact_emails BEGIN UPDATE contact_emails SET updated_at = STRFTIME('%s', 'NOW') WHERE id = NEW.id;END
